text.设置_AI_接口_识图屏幕和弹幕效果_保存后立即生效: Set AI API, capture screen, and danmu effects—applies after save
text.开启后模型会先进行内部思考再生成弹幕_响应延迟增加且_Token_消耗上升_思考: When on, model thinks internally before danmu; higher latency and token use. Thinking is not shown in danmu.
text.当前_API_模式不支持思考模式: Current API mode does not support thinking mode
text.开启后_说完一句话会额外生成几条接话弹幕_并插队显示_不影响看屏识图的节奏_请: When on, after you speak, extra reply danmu are generated and shown out of order without affecting capture rhythm. Please
text.环境较吵时启动后会自动校准_录音只在内存里处理_不会保存到硬盘: ; auto-calibrates in noisy environments. Audio stays in memory, not saved to disk.
text.默认开启_开麦使用_API_与模型_里的接口与视觉模型_关闭后可单独配置支持麦克: Default on: mic uses API & model above. Off: configure a mic-capable model separately (capture still uses vision model).
text.保存在本机并加密_与识图密钥分开: (saved locally, encrypted, separate from capture key)
text.仅列出目录中带_支持麦克风_标识的模型_豆包全模态或小米_MiMo_的_mimo: Lists only models marked「Supports microphone」; Doubao multimodal or Xiaomi MiMo mimo-v2.5.
text.默认跟随_Windows_当前默认录音设备_也可以手动固定到某一只麦克风: Follows Windows default recording device; or pin a specific mic manually.
text.测试麦克风_只检查有没有声音_不会联网_测试发送_会录音并请求_AI_请先点: 「Test microphone」checks for sound only—no network.「Test send」records and requests AI. Save settings first. For Bluetooth headsets, set the headset as default mic in Windows Settings → System → Sound → Input.
text.使用语音合成定时随机朗读当前屏幕上的一条弹幕: Use TTS to randomly read one visible on-screen danmu on a timer
text.TTS_API_Key_与弹幕设置中的视觉_API_Key: . TTS API Key and the visual API Key in Danmu Settings
text.请在本页单独填写: , fill in separately on this page.
text.且屏幕上有可见弹幕时才会朗读_停止生成后不再请求: and only reads when visible danmu are on screen; stops requesting after generation stops.
text.每隔若干秒随机选一条当前屏上可见弹幕合成语音_3_120_秒_间隔过短会在上一: Every few seconds, randomly pick one visible danmu for TTS (3–120s). Too short an interval may interrupt the previous
text.无法开始下一句_合成约需_10_20_秒_建议间隔_15_秒: Cannot start next line; synthesis takes ~10–20s; interval ≥15s recommended.
text.不同_OpenRouter_One_API_等普通聊天模型通常: different. OpenRouter, One API, and other chat models usually
text.返回音频_请勿直接复用弹幕生成模型: Returns audio—do not reuse the danmu generation model directly.
text.选择_默认_时不保存平台字段_朗读使用_MiMo_出厂配置_百炼须选择_TTS: 「Default」does not save platform field; MiMo factory TTS config is used. DashScope requires a TTS model.
text.对应_API_中_role_为_user_的消息_用于控制语气与风格_新装默认已: Maps to API user-role message for tone/style; fresh install has a tear-jerker preset; blank reads danmu text only.
text.试听可使用上方输入框中的_Key_无需先保存_定时朗读须保存并_开始生成: Preview can use the Key in the input above without saving; timed reading requires save and Start danmu.
text.桌宠弹幕模式已开启_请先在桌宠界面关闭后再修改: Pet danmu mode is on; disable it in Pet settings before changing.
text.每次固定_5_条_保存后会同步到人格工坊的_输出契约: Fixed 5 per batch · syncs to Persona Studio「Output contract」after save
text.透明度过低可能导致弹幕完全不可见: Opacity too low may make danmu invisible
text.空轨道时加速补位: Speed up when track is empty
text.也可点击下方按钮用鼠标框选子区域_坐标相对该屏左上角_请在_API_与模型: ; or click below to drag a sub-region (coords relative to display top-left). Pick in「API & model」
text.后再框选_截图只在内存里压缩后发给_AI: then re-select. Screenshots are compressed in memory only before sending to AI,
text.默认不会保存到硬盘: Not saved to disk by default
text.框选时按_Esc_或右键取消_区域过小_小于_10_10_像素_将视为无效: Press Esc or right-click to cancel; region under 10×10 px is invalid.
text.请确认字体授权允许个人使用_DanmuAI_只在本机加载字体_不会上传到外部服务: Confirm font license allows personal use; DanmuAI loads fonts locally only.
text.根据当前表单值实时预览弹幕效果_不会保存或发送到_overlay_轨道带可视化反: Live preview from current form values; not saved or sent to overlay. Track bands show drawable area and margins for track rows and layout.

placeholder.温柔微颤语气_1_0倍速_温暖音色_独白式表达_句尾轻收配合自然呼吸停顿_情绪克: Gentle trembling tone, 1.0× speed, warm voice, monologue style, soft endings with natural pauses, restrained layered emotion—for tear-jerker healing danmu
